rationale: Section 11.22 establishes independent fixed-dollar exemptions for disabled veterans based on disability rating. It does not reference or depend on the §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so raising that amount creates no conflict.
quote: A disabled veteran is entitled to an exemption from taxation of a portion of the assessed value of a property the veteran owns and designates as provided by Subsection (f) in accordance with the following schedule:
_note: No cross-reference between §11.22 and §11.13(b) found in the provided rule text. The two exemption schemes operate independently.
